As the game progressed, I saw that the other players were punishing me for paying low; they got paid a lower amount if I did. So, near the middle of the game, I chose to go all; in and punish others who were still only contributing a small amount. At the end I realized that it made the most sense to use all of my coins for each round to get the max amount of coins for everyone.
